description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named staged-continuous-integration that runs on push to the develop branch and on pull requests to any branch except when markdown files change. The workflow has a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs on pull requests. It requires read-all permissions and consists of multiple jobs: clang-format-check, cmake-format-check, initial-check, codeql, windows-cuda, linux-x64, linux-x64-hpx, linux-x86, osx-x64, arm64, and performance-test. Each job depends on the initial-check, clang-format-check, and cmake-format-check jobs.
